name: Make claiming rebates easier for consumers (CA SB 1154 support letter)
description: Consumers Union letter to California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger urging signature of SB 1154 (Figueroa), a bill making it easier for consumers to claim mail-in rebates. The letter cites Peter Kastner of Aberdeen Group (via a NY Times article of April 17, 2003) as an authoritative source on why consumers fail to collect rebates. Represents Kastner's analyst commentary feeding into legislative policy advocacy.

creator.name: Shelley Curran (Consumers Union / Consumer Reports); Peter Kastner (secondary-source citation via NY Times)
